artifacts.summary: Official-domain discovery produced one verified university-wide Politecnico di Milano source with substantive AI rules: the March 2025 personal-data and ICT security regulation. A GSoM policy result was not used because current HTTP and Playwright verification rendered a Not Found page, and a POLITesi thesis result was rejected as repository research content rather than institutional policy.

artifacts.claimText: Politecnico di Milano's personal-data and ICT security regulation treats AI-system use in academic, research, and administrative activities as subject to ethical, responsible, legally compliant use aligned with the university's values.

artifacts.claimText: Politecnico di Milano's regulation prohibits users from providing sensitive data to AI systems hosted outside the university, including credentials, personal identifying information, non-anonymized data, copyrighted data, university intellectual property, or data that could harm the university's reputation.

artifacts.claimText: Politecnico di Milano's regulation says users must be informed and made aware that data supplied to commercial AI tools may be visible and recorded by third parties, creating potential security risks.

artifacts.sourceTitle: Regolamento del Politecnico di Milano in materia di trattamento dei dati personali e della sicurezza ICT
artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: L'uso di sistemi di intelligenza artificiale (IA) è sempre più centrale nelle attività accademiche, di ricerca e amministrative. Per garantire un utilizzo etico e responsabile, conforme alle normative vigenti e ai valori del Politecnico di Milano occorre fornire una serie di norme di principio. Gli utenti devono assicurare che l'uso del sistema IA sia etico e conforme alle normative vigenti.
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: The regulation says AI-system use is increasingly central in academic, research, and administrative activities, and users must ensure AI-system use is ethical and legally compliant.
artifacts.evidenceLocator: CAPO VIII, Art. 38, Sistemi di intelligenza artificiale
artifacts.rightsNote: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.sourceTitle: Regolamento del Politecnico di Milano in materia di trattamento dei dati personali e della sicurezza ICT
artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: È vietato fornire dati sensibili a sistemi di IA ospitati al di fuori dell’Ateneo, fra cui: password e nomi utente; informazioni di identificazione personale; dati non anonimizzati; dati protetti da diritto d’autore; dati relativi alla proprietà intellettuale dell'Ateneo; qualsiasi dato che potrebbe danneggiare la reputazione del Politecnico di Milano.

artifacts.notes: Approved as a narrow staged candidate because Art. 38 directly states the scope and ethical/legal compliance requirement for AI-system use.
Approved as a staged candidate because Art. 39 directly prohibits providing listed sensitive data categories to AI systems hosted outside the university.
Approved as a staged candidate because Art. 39 directly states the notice requirement and security risk for data supplied to commercial AI tools.

artifacts.title: Politecnico di Milano staged AI policy crawl
artifacts.summary: Staged crawl for Politecnico di Milano (QS 2026 row 99; rank =98; Italy) found one verified official university-wide Italian source: the March 2025 regulation on personal-data processing and ICT security. The regulation contains Chapter VIII on artificial intelligence and supports three narrow staged claims about ethical/legal AI use, externally hosted AI systems and sensitive data, and commercial AI-tool data visibility/security risk. The GSoM generative-AI policy result was rejected because current HTTP and Playwright verification returned Not Found, and a POLITesi thesis result was rejected as low-specificity repository research content.
limitations: This tracker is not legal advice, not academic integrity advice, and not an official university statement unless a linked source is the university's own official page.
This staged run does not publish canonical claims and does not mark any item human_reviewed.
The verified source is Italian; evidenceSnippetOriginal preserves the original Italian text and English snippets are helper display text only.
The GSoM generative-AI policy search result was not used because current direct HTTP and Playwright verification resolved the page as Not Found.
No login-gated, paywalled, CAPTCHA, WAF, or otherwise blocked source was bypassed.
artifacts.sourceRightsPolicy: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.
